title: Irish Golden Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Irish golden gratin dish made with golden potatoes, glorious cheese, and a touch of irish flair.
instructions: In a large saucepan, boil the sliced potatoes in salted water until slightly tender. Drain and set aside.
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the grated cheddar cheese to the saucepan and stir until melted and smooth.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes. Top with a layer of the cheese mixture and repeat until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
